spots.description: River Monastery is a beautiful monastery destination in Tamil Nadu, situated approximately 9km from Chennai. It offers visitors a wonderful experience of the region's natural and cultural heritage, making it a must-visit location in South India.
spots.travel_information: Best time to visit: July to September. Accessible by road and train from Chennai. Entry fee: Free. Local guides available on site.
